hero.title: All AI models in one place
hero.description: Explore every AI model available in OpenCreator. Compare capabilities, credits per generation and find the best fit for your workflows.
hero.note: Model pricing and availability are powered directly by the internal configuration, so this page always reflects the latest changes.

text.title: Text models
text.description: General-purpose reasoning, writing and analysis models.

video.title: Image to video
video.description: Image-to-video models for cinematic clips and ads.

textToVideo.title: Text to video
textToVideo.description: Text-to-video models for scripts and storyboards.

DescribeImage.title: Describe image
DescribeImage.description: Vision-language models to understand and describe images.

startEndFrame.title: Start & end frame
startEndFrame.description: Models optimized for keyframe-based video generation.

imageAngleControl.title: Image angle control
imageAngleControl.description: Multi-view synthesis models that generate new angles from a single photo.

videoLipSync.title: Video lip sync
videoLipSync.description: Models that sync lip motion to speech audio.
